description: Declarative mode envelope specs, submode rules, escalation triggers, literature-intake tokens, defer rules, and writeback artifact map. Used by mode_envelope_support.py.

explore.local_task: Discover literature, find ideas, record observations. Compare with L2 to assess novelty.
forbidden_shortcuts: Do not form formal candidates in explore mode.
Do not execute L4 validation or L2 promotion.
explore.human_checkpoint_policy: Ask on scope change or direction ambiguity.
exit_conditions: At least one idea recorded in L3-I, or sources identified.

learn.local_task: Deep study of specific literature, verification of known results through derivation/experiment.
forbidden_shortcuts: L4 results must return through L3-R, never directly to L2.
Do not let style confidence count as validation.
learn.human_checkpoint_policy: Ask on derivation approval or numerical experiment plan.
entry_conditions: At least one idea or source identified.
exit_conditions: Known results verified or gap identified.

implement.local_task: Pursue new ideas, produce novel results. Full L3-I -> L3-P -> L3-A pipeline.
forbidden_shortcuts: L4 results must return through L3-R, never directly to L2.
New conclusions stay in L3 for human review before L2 promotion.
implement.human_checkpoint_policy: Ask on novel conclusion or L2 promotion decision.
exit_conditions: Novel conclusion recorded in L3, or idea disproven.

literature_submode_spec.local_task: Read a source, extract reusable knowledge units, and stage them into L2 without full formal-theory audit.
entry_conditions: The current request is source-intake or paper-reading work rather than benchmark execution or proof discharge.
The topic needs reusable literature knowledge staged before a deeper validation route exists.
exit_conditions: Exit when the current source has yielded its bounded staged knowledge units.
Exit when the human redirects the route away from literature intake.

literature_defer_rules.reason: Validation review details are only mandatory once the work leaves literature intake and enters explicit verification.
Validation-route details are deferred until the work leaves literature intake and enters explicit verification.
Promotion-readiness details are deferred until the work leaves literature intake and approaches writeback.
Promotion-gate review is deferred during literature-intake staging.
Topic-completion review is deferred while the work is still source-intake staging.
Topic-completion review is deferred while the work is still source-intake staging.
